reference: I had a cesarean section thirty-one days ago and have been wearing a pad for the discharge since then. I just noticed two small pimple-like bumps on the lip of my vagina. Could this be irritation from the constant pad wearing? I am very anxious, and since it is late at night, I am not sure whom to ask. I have my follow-up appointment on Monday.
text: I had a cesarean 31 days ago and have been wearing a pad for the discharge since then. I just noticed two small pimple-like bumps on the lip of my vagina. Could this be irritation from the constant pad wearing? I am very anxious, and since it is late at night, I am not sure whom to ask. I have my follow-up appointment on Monday.
